prompt: Create a photorealistic editorial fashion portrait of a 22-year-old Korean woman seated elegantly in a modern cream-colored upholstered armchair in a warm luxury apartment interior. She has long straight dark brown hair styled in a high ponytail with a large black ribbon bow, pearl drop earrings, manicured nails, and refined model-like posture. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a plain square blur/mosaic block centered over the face. She wears a black satin strapless corset with silver floral embroidery, tiny rhinestone details, front hook closures, black lace trim, garter straps, and black fishnet thigh-high stockings with lace tops. Pose her sitting slightly angled toward the camera with legs crossed, one arm resting on the chair arm, and the other hand raised near her temple, conveying elegant confidence rather than explicitness. The setting should include exactly 4 prominent background decor elements: a tall arched brass floor lamp on the left, a large framed abstract line-art print behind her, a small round marble side table on the right, and a smoked-glass mushroom table lamp glowing warmly on the table. Use a beige plaster wall, soft cream rug with subtle geometric texture, muted neutral palette, and cozy evening ambient lighting. Shoot in a realistic high-end lifestyle photography style with shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, soft shadows, crisp fabric details, vertical 4:5 composition, waist-to-knees framing with full chair visible, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
